languages.text: {n}Машинные духи трона мгновенно разражаются какофонией тревожных сигналов. Вы успеваете насчитать не менее тридцати ударов собственного пульса, пока пульсирующий орган не оказывается возвращен в грудь обладателя. Пепельная тень смерти понемногу покидает лицо Эоганна.{/n} "Во славу Омниссии! Нунциус, это то, что мы искали. Тридцатисекундный интервал оптимален для изъятия органа без возникновения дисфункции!"

{n}The throne's machine spirits instantly erupt in a cacophony of alarms. You count no less than thirty beats of your own heart before the pulsing organ is returned to its owner's chest. The ashen shadow of death slowly leaves Eogunn's face.{/n} "Praise the Omnissiah! Nuncius, this is what we've been searching for. A thirty-second interval is optimal for removing the organ without causing dysfunction!"
languages.original_text: {n}Машинные духи трона мгновенно разражаются какофонией тревожных сигналов. Пепельная тень смерти понемногу покидает лицо Эоганна.{/n} "Во славу Омниссии! Нунциус, это то, что мы искали. Тридцатисекундный интервал оптимален для изъятия органа без возникновения дисфункции!"

Nuncius, this is what we've been searching for. A thirty-second interval is optimal for removing the organ without causing dysfunction!"

The ashen shadow of death slowly leaves Eogunn's face.{/n} "Praise the Omnissiah! Nuncius, this is what we've been searching for. A thirty-second interval is optimal for removing the organ without causing dysfunction!"

languages.text: {n}Die Maschinengeister des Throns brechen sofort in eine Kakofonie von Alarmen aus. Du zählst nicht weniger als dreißig Herzschläge, ehe das pulsierende Organ wieder in die Brust seines Besitzers eingesetzt wird. Langsam weicht der aschene Schatten des Todes aus Eogunns Gesicht.{/n} "Gepriesen sei der Omnissiah. Nuncius, genau danach haben wir gesucht. Ein Intervall von dreißig Sekunden ist optimal für die Entfernung des Organs, ohne seine Funktion zu stören!"
languages.original_text: {n}The throne's machine spirits instantly erupt in a cacophony of alarms. You count no less than thirty beats of your own heart before the pulsing organ is returned to its owner's chest. The ashen shadow of death slowly leaves Eogunn's face.{/n} "Praise the Omnissiah! Nuncius, this is what we've been searching for. A thirty-second interval is optimal for removing the organ without causing dysfunction!"

Du zählst nicht weniger als dreißig Herzschläge, ehe das pulsierende Organ wieder in die Brust seines Besitzers eingesetzt wird. Langsam weicht der aschene Schatten des Todes aus Eogunns Gesicht.{/n} "Gepriesen sei der Omnissiah. Nuncius, genau danach haben wir gesucht. Ein Intervall von dreißig Sekunden ist optimal für die Entfernung des Organs, ohne seine Funktion zu stören!"

languages.text: {n}Les esprits de la machine du fauteuil émettent soudain une cacophonie d'alarmes. Vous comptez pas moins de trente battements de votre propre cœur avant que l'organe palpitant soit remis dans la poitrine de son propriétaire. L'ombre de la mort disparaît peu à peu du visage d'Eogunn.{/n} « Loué soit l'Omnimessie ! Nuncius, c'est exactement ce que nous cherchions. Un intervalle de trente secondes est idéal pour retirer l'organe sans provoquer de dysfonctionnement ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The throne's machine spirits instantly erupt in a cacophony of alarms. You count no less than thirty beats of your own heart before the pulsing organ is returned to its owner's chest. The ashen shadow of death slowly leaves Eogunn's face.{/n} "Praise the Omnissiah! Nuncius, this is what we've been searching for. A thirty-second interval is optimal for removing the organ without causing dysfunction!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Les esprits de la machine du fauteuil émettent soudain une cacophonie d'alarmes. Vous comptez pas moins de trente battements de votre propre cœur avant que l'organe palpitant soit remis dans la poitrine de son propriétaire. L'ombre de la mort disparaît peu à peu du visage d'Eogunn.{/n} « Loué soit l'Omnimessie ! Nuncius, c'est exactement ce que nous cherchions. Un intervalle de trente secondes est idéal pour retirer l'organe sans provoquer de dysfonctionnement ! »

languages.text: {n}王座的机魂瞬间爆发出刺耳的警报声。你数着自己的心跳，至少三十次心跳之后，那颗搏动着的器官才被重新放回主人的胸腔。死亡的灰影缓缓从伊奥贡的面容上褪去。{/n}“赞美欧姆尼赛亚！努恩修斯，这正是我们一直在寻求的答案。三十秒的间隔，是在不引发功能紊乱的前提下摘除器官的最优时长！”
languages.original_text: {n}The throne's machine spirits instantly erupt in a cacophony of alarms. You count no less than thirty beats of your own heart before the pulsing organ is returned to its owner's chest. The ashen shadow of death slowly leaves Eogunn's face.{/n} "Praise the Omnissiah! Nuncius, this is what we've been searching for. A thirty-second interval is optimal for removing the organ without causing dysfunction!"

traits.locale_text: {n}王座的机魂瞬间爆发出刺耳的警报声。你数着自己的心跳，至少三十次心跳之后，那颗搏动着的器官才被重新放回主人的胸腔。死亡的灰影缓缓从伊奥贡的面容上褪去。{/n}“赞美欧姆尼赛亚！努恩修斯，这正是我们一直在寻求的答案。三十秒的间隔，是在不引发功能紊乱的前提下摘除器官的最优时长！”

languages.text: {n}Los espíritus máquina del trono emiten una cacofonía de alarmas. Cuentas treinta latidos de tu corazón antes de que el órgano latiente vuelva al pecho de su propietario. La cinérea sombra de la muerte abandona lentamente la cara de Eogunn.{/n} «¡Loado sea el Omnissiah! Nuncius, esto es justo lo que buscábamos. ¡Un intervalo de treinta segundos es el ideal para extraer un órgano sin disfunciones!».
languages.original_text: {n}The throne's machine spirits instantly erupt in a cacophony of alarms. You count no less than thirty beats of your own heart before the pulsing organ is returned to its owner's chest. The ashen shadow of death slowly leaves Eogunn's face.{/n} "Praise the Omnissiah! Nuncius, this is what we've been searching for. A thirty-second interval is optimal for removing the organ without causing dysfunction!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Los espíritus máquina del trono emiten una cacofonía de alarmas. Cuentas treinta latidos de tu corazón antes de que el órgano latiente vuelva al pecho de su propietario. La cinérea sombra de la muerte abandona lentamente la cara de Eogunn.{/n} «¡Loado sea el Omnissiah! Nuncius, esto es justo lo que buscábamos. ¡Un intervalo de treinta segundos es el ideal para extraer un órgano sin disfunciones!».

languages.text: {n}玉座の自動装置が瞬時にアラームと赤いライトの不協和音に包まれる。脈打つ臓器が持ち主の胸に戻されるまで、あなたは自分の脈拍を30回以上数えることができた。エオガンの顔から、死の灰のような影がゆっくりと消えていく。{/n}「素晴らしい！ヌンキウス、これこそ我々が求めていたものだ。機能障害を起こさずに臓器を取り出すには、30秒の間隔が最適だ！」
languages.original_text: {n}The throne's machine spirits instantly erupt in a cacophony of alarms. You count no less than thirty beats of your own heart before the pulsing organ is returned to its owner's chest. The ashen shadow of death slowly leaves Eogunn's face.{/n} "Praise the Omnissiah! Nuncius, this is what we've been searching for. A thirty-second interval is optimal for removing the organ without causing dysfunction!"

traits.locale_text: {n}玉座の自動装置が瞬時にアラームと赤いライトの不協和音に包まれる。脈打つ臓器が持ち主の胸に戻されるまで、あなたは自分の脈拍を30回以上数えることができた。エオガンの顔から、死の灰のような影がゆっくりと消えていく。{/n}「素晴らしい！ヌンキウス、これこそ我々が求めていたものだ。機能障害を起こさずに臓器を取り出すには、30秒の間隔が最適だ！」

languages.text: {n}Tahtın makine ruhları, anında bir alarm kakofonisiyle patlıyor. Nabız gibi atan orga, sahibinin göğsüne geri dönene dek kendi kalbinin en az otuz atışını sayıyorsun. Ölümün kül rengi gölgesi, yavaşça Eogunn'un yüzünü terk ediyor.{/n} "Hermesih'e şükürler olsun! Nuncius, aradığımızı bulduk. İşlev bozukluğuna neden olmadan organı çıkarmak için otuz saniyelik bir aralık en uygunu!"
